delete_events.description: If true, queue deletion of all events associated with these persons.

delete_recordings.description: If true, queue deletion of all recordings associated with these persons.

distinct_ids.description: A list of distinct IDs whose associated persons will be deleted (max 1000).

ids.description: A list of PostHog person UUIDs to delete (max 1000).

keep_person.description: If true, keep the person records but delete their events and recordings.
